info.title: CareRound API
info.description: API documentation for the CareRound digital ward management system.

tags.name: Patient Vitals
tags.description: Patient vital-sign recording, history, and latest-reading endpoints

tags.name: Clinical Notes
tags.description: Clinical note creation, amendment, and patient note history endpoints

tags.name: System Configuration
tags.description: Tenant-level hospital system configuration lookup and updates

tags.name: Hospitals
tags.description: Hospital tenant lookup endpoints

tags.name: Platform Authentication
tags.description: Authentication for internal CareRound platform operators

tags.name: Departments
tags.description: Hospital department creation, lookup, update, and deletion endpoints

tags.name: Handovers
tags.description: Clinical handover initiation, completion, ward lookup, and patient handover notes

tags.name: On-Call Rotations
tags.description: On-call roster creation, lookup, current assignment, and deletion endpoints

tags.name: Escalations
tags.description: Clinical escalation creation, lookup, acknowledgement, and resolution endpoints

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Tenant user authentication, session refresh, logout, password changes, and account activation

tags.name: Medical Teams
tags.description: Medical team management, ward assignment, invitations, and membership endpoints

tags.name: Hospital Onboarding
tags.description: Public hospital onboarding requests and platform-admin review/provisioning workflow

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Tenant user creation, lookup, profile, and account lifecycle endpoints

tags.name: Dashboards
tags.description: Role-specific operational dashboard summaries

tags.name: Wards
tags.description: Ward creation, lookup, update, and deletion endpoints

tags.name: Patients
tags.description: Patient admission, lookup, search, discharge readiness, and status endpoints

tags.name: Next of Kin
tags.description: Patient next-of-kin contacts, notification consent, and removal endpoints

tags.name: Care Tasks
tags.description: Clinical and nursing care-task creation, assignment, status updates, and lookup

tags.name: Rounds
tags.description: Ward round creation, progress tracking, patient reviews, and completion endpoints

tags.name: Shifts
tags.description: Shift staff assignment and current ward shift lookup endpoints

tags.name: Shift Schedules
tags.description: Shift schedule creation, active schedule lookup, and deactivation endpoints

put.description: Moves a submitted request through the platform review workflow, such as contacted, approved, or rejected.

post.description: Authenticates an internal platform operator and returns a platform-scoped JWT for onboarding administration.

get.description: Returns onboarding requests for platform admins, optionally filtered by review status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of requests to return

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for fetching the next page

post.description: Creates a public onboarding request for platform review. This does not create a live hospital tenant.
Creates the hospital tenant, default configuration, and first inactive tenant admin from an approved onboarding request.
Creates a patient care task, validates its time window, and assigns it using the active ward staffing rules.
Validates an active refresh token, revokes it, and returns a new access token and refresh token pair.
Revokes the supplied refresh token so it can no longer be used for session renewal.
Authenticates an active hospital user and returns an access token plus a persisted refresh token.
Changes the authenticated user's password and revokes all of their existing refresh tokens.
Consumes a valid account activation token, sets the user's password, and enables normal login.

patch.summary: Mark a care task in progress
patch.description: Moves a pending care task into the in-progress state.
Marks an in-progress or pending care task as completed.

patch.summary: Assign or reassign a care task
patch.description: Assigns a care task to a nurse. Manual reassignment is restricted to ward supervisors or the task creator.

get.description: Fetches one onboarding request by id for platform-admin review.
Returns all provisioned hospitals. This endpoint is restricted to platform administrators.
Returns the hospital tenant associated with the authenticated tenant user's JWT.
Returns shift, ward, patient, and escalation metrics for the authenticated ward supervisor.
Returns ward-care and task metrics for nurses.
Returns the role-appropriate dashboard summary for the authenticated tenant user.
Returns the authenticated doctor's dashboard, scoped by their role and hospital.
Returns consultant-focused clinical and team summary metrics.
Returns hospital administration metrics for tenant admins.
Returns care tasks for a ward, filtered by task status. Defaults to pending tasks.
Returns all care tasks recorded for a patient.
